query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.totalAmount,
  COALESCE(p.totalAmount, 0) as totalAmount_coalesce,
  COUNT(pay.id) as num_pagos,
  SUM(pay.amount) as total_pagado
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN payments pay ON p.id = pay.projectId
WHERE p.id IN (1290001, 1260001, 390001, 1170002, 540001, 1170001)
GROUP BY p.id, p.totalAmount
ORDER BY p.id DESC;

  COUNT(pay.id) as num_pagos,

FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN payments pay ON p.id = pay.projectId
WHERE p.id IN (1290001, 1260001, 390001, 1170002, 540001, 1170001)
